bid_claims.quote_text: The merger agreement provides that at the effective time of the merger each outstanding share of common stock (other than shares owned by the Company, any subsidiary of the Company, Parent, any direct or indirect holding company of Parent, Merger Sub and holders who are entitled to and properly exercise appraisal rights under Delaware law), will be converted into the right to receive $83.00 in cash (the “merger consideration”).
